content:
Mastery Exam Section
Dante Alighieri – “Abandon all hope, ye who enter this final challenge.”


✅ Why This Works:
• Ties into literary history while making content more engaging.
• Gives each section a distinct, personality-driven voice.

📌 Version 4.7: Final Questions Before Lock-In

1. Should students who achieve a perfect score on all Mastery Exams be given an option to create a new rule for the class?

✔ If they complete the “Perfect Thought Purity” challenge, they can write & implement a rule for one week.

2. Should failing a Mastery Exam allow students to take an alternate “Redemption Path” instead of getting a status effect?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 77 (chunk 77/555)
